generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dtdf/vocab#
instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam box (0.03 m³ air volume)"
]
instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent, DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) controlled via MOSFETs handling 4A current"
]
instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent, DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Fan (0.02 m³/s airflow) operating at 12V or 24V"
]
instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent, DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer (-55°C to +125°C, ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C)"
]
instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent, DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer (-55°C to +125°C, ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C)"
]
instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent, DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer (-55°C to +125°C, ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C)"
]
instance RaspberryPi : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]
instance PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for signal isolation"
]
instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]
instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, Heatbed, Fan, DS18S20TemperatureSensor1, DS18S20TemperatureSensor2, DS18S20TemperatureSensor3, RaspberryPi, PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers, PowerSupply
]
instance TemperatureDataFromDS18S20Sensors : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20TemperatureSensor1, DS18S20TemperatureSensor2, DS18S20TemperatureSensor3
]
instance PredictiveTemperatureSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive temperature simulation results informing control decisions"
]
instance SafetyViolationDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation detected requiring human intervention or system reconfiguration"
]
instance ModelCalibrationCompletedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model calibration completed successfully"
]
instance HeatbedActivationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activation of heatbed based on predictive simulation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance SafetyViolationResponseAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Response to safety violation (human intervention or system reconfiguration)",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance RealTimeSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation models for temperature prediction",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveTemperatureSimulationInsight, HeatbedActivationAction
]
instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model calibration using non-linear least squares optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationCompletedInsight
]
instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring for safety and optimization violations based on predicted vs. actual thermal behavior",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationDetectedInsight, SafetyViolationResponseAction
]
instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AMQP-based message broker for communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeSimulationService, ModelCalibrationService, MonitoringService
]
instance RaspberryPiPlatformEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B as controller platform",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeSimulationService, ModelCalibrationService, MonitoringService
]
instance ScipyOptimizationLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]
instance PythonLowLevelDriver : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based low-level driver for sensor reading and RabbitMQ publishing",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeSimulationService, ModelCalibrationService, MonitoringService
]
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataFromDS18S20Sensors,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonLowLevelDriver, RabbitMQMessageBroker
]
instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simplified thermal dynamics model assuming perfect heat transfer parameters C_air and G_box",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationLibrary, PythonLowLevelDriver
]
instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Detailed thermal dynamics model accounting for heatbed thermal inertia parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationLibrary, PythonLowLevelDriver
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) generated by the controller are sent to the RabbitMQ server, processed by the low-level driver, and executed via MOSFET-driven actuators on the PCB."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi), low-level driver, controller, and simulation models interconnected via message queues; physical components (heatbed, fan, sensors) communicate with DT through RabbitMQ and 1-Wire bus protocols."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, where the DT integrates with the deployed physical system to monitor and optimize real-time thermal behavior during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumptions validated via sensor placement experiments (e.g., temperature uniformity tested with max 7°C discrepancy between sensors), model calibration using residual error minimization, and optimization of sensor positions to reduce temperature variance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) for inter-component communication; 1-Wire bus for sensor data transmission; GPIO pins on Raspberry Pi connected to PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuator control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and controller software deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware in an on-premises configuration."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety; MOSFETs and optocouplers provide electrical isolation between control signals and high-current components to prevent hardware damage."
]
